name: Calendar
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Calendar helper with local ISO date-grid generation, single-date selection, disabled dates, outside-month state, month navigation, keyboard focus movement, RTL rendering, and deterministic examples.

registry.reason: Calendar day and navigation buttons compose the local shadcn Button class contract.
Booked dates example composes the local shadcn Card item.
Calendar uses local class canonicalization and Tailwind conflict handling.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, message, Scene, and Foldkit-native view/update APIs.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, Match, and Array helpers.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin calendar behavior is represented by local Foldkit date-grid helpers instead of the React DayPicker runtime.
Supported examples use local UTC-safe date arithmetic instead of date-fns.
RTL example uses deterministic locale strings through native Intl formatting.
Persian/Hijri calendar behavior is deferred until a reusable local date foundation exists.
Origin chevrons are represented by local inline SVG helpers in installable source.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by deterministic local RTL data.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: CalendarDemo
examples.description: Single-date Calendar with selected date, today state, border, and dropdown-style caption.
examples.distinguishes: Single-date Calendar with selected date, today state, border, and dropdown-style caption.

examples.title: CalendarBasic
examples.description: Basic single-month Calendar with outside days and base-nova border surface.
examples.distinguishes: Basic single-month Calendar with outside days and base-nova border surface.

examples.title: CalendarBookedDates
examples.description: Calendar inside a local Card with deterministic disabled booked dates.
examples.distinguishes: Calendar inside a local Card with deterministic disabled booked dates.

examples.title: CalendarRtl
examples.description: RTL Calendar using local direction and Intl locale data instead of the origin language selector runtime.
examples.distinguishes: RTL Calendar using local direction and Intl locale data instead of the origin language selector runtime.

deviations.summary: Calendar uses local ISO date-grid helpers and Foldkit messages instead of react-day-picker and React state.
deviations.rationale: Installable source must stay Foldkit-native and cannot depend on the React DayPicker runtime.

deviations.summary: Calendar navigation and caption chevrons use local inline SVG helpers instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. Local SVGs preserve the chevron footprint and class-token affordances.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local direction and native Intl formatting instead of the origin language-selector runtime.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local deterministic data preserves the rendered RTL surface.

deviations.summary: Range, multiple-date, Persian/Hijri, presets, time, custom-day, caption-select, and week-number examples are deferred.
deviations.rationale: Those examples need a larger reusable local date foundation. This slice lands the supported single-month and single-date surface without upstream runtime packages.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Calendar helper with local ISO date-grid generation, single-date selection, disabled dates, outside-month state, month navigation, keyboard focus movement, RTL rendering, and deterministic examples.
